subcodes.first_line: Should Jinab-i-Jím proceed, the Tablet shall be sent forth, specifically addressed to those two souls. On this day, we and they must all observe [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر جناب ج میروند لوح ارسال میشود مخصوص نفسین الیوم باید ما و ایشان کل ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @living waters; water of life, @suffering and imprisonment
